steps.t: Edrud Scurloc has asked you to rescue her husband and sons, who went to the Hove farm to fight goblins. The Hove farm is in north-eastern Cardolan.
You have managed to free all of the Scurloc men. You should return to Edrud and let her know they're all safe. Edrud is at the Scurloc farmstead, in n…
